name: portraits_modernize
description: Convert historical portrait engravings to modern photorealistic portraits

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic portrait photography, {subject}, high quality, detailed facial features, natural lighting, professional photography, 8k
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, painting, sketch, illustration, engraving, low quality, blurry, distorted, text, watermark, deformed hands

notes: Optimized for portrait engravings. Lineart controlnet preserves facial structure. Higher step count for better detail.
